narrative:
Precinct Upper 1 (precinct in Lawrence County) has 280 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.4 percentage points.
